story: At the park, Houston realizes the “Annette” he met is actually Danielle, Annette’s little sister. The real Annette arrives; they laugh, catch up, and discover they’re both starting junior year, both pre‑med. They decide to grab coffee a few blocks away, just the two of them, Retro heeling. Two blocks over, a barista flips the café’s sign to “Closed for a private event” for the rest of the afternoon. They wave to Danielle on the swing and turn toward the street.
implausible_knowledge: Two blocks over, a barista flips the café’s sign to “Closed for a private event” for the rest of the afternoon.
question: After agreeing to get coffee a few blocks away and waving to Danielle, what will Houston most likely do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Suggest choosing a different open café instead of heading there.
answer_without_knowledge: Start walking toward the coffee shop they mentioned.
